query:
SELECT e.id, e.codigoInterno, e.nomeCompleto, c.nomeFantasia, 
  CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(e.codigoInterno, '[^0-9]', '') AS UNSIGNED) as numPart
FROM employees e 
JOIN companies c ON e.companyId = c.id
WHERE CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(e.codigoInterno, '[^0-9]', '') AS UNSIGNED) IN (13, 17, 22, 24, 69, 171, 666)
ORDER BY c.nomeFantasia, numPart;

SELECT e.id, e.codigoInterno, e.nomeCompleto, c.nomeFantasia, 
  CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(e.codigoInterno, '[^0-9]', '') AS UNSIGNED) as numPart
FROM employees e 
JOIN companies c ON e.companyId = c.id
WHERE CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(e.codigoInterno, '[^0-9]', '') AS UNSIGNED) IN (13, 17, 22, 24, 69, 171, 666)
ORDER BY c.nomeFantasia, numPart;
